## Documentation Issue

Please describe the documentation issue or improvement:

## Location

Where is the documentation that needs to be updated?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Code comments/JSDoc
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Other: [please specify]

## Current Documentation

What does the current documentation say? (copy/paste or link)

## Suggested Improvement

What should it say instead? How can it be improved?

## Why is this important?

Explain why this change would help users or contributors.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots here.
